channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Women and the Taliban: Apartheid by Another Name
item.description: South Africa cannot claim to have invented racism, but as we know, apartheid went far beyond racism. It was institutionalized and systemic, a form of governance based on race-based hate and the perpetuation of race-based discrimination. Faced with a crime as broad as a country, the world responded by recognizing apartheid as a crime against ... Read more

item.title: Deadly bombing of Iran primary school ‘a grave violation of humanitarian law’: UNESCO
item.description: The UN education agency, UNESCO, says that the bombing of a primary school during the US and Israeli military attacks on Iran on Saturday constitutes a grave violation of humanitarian law.

item.title: Justice on the move: Mobile courts offer hope for communities in South Sudan
item.description: Travelling more than 200 kilometres (124 miles) from Yambio, the capital of Western Equatoria State in southwestern South Sudan, a team of justice experts escorted by United Nations peacekeepers moved slowly along rough, dusty roads, determined to reach communities that have waited years for their day in court.

item.title: UN Security Council Falls Short of Fully Condemning US-Israeli Attack on Iran
item.description: Most of the 15 members of the United Nations Security Council fell short of condemning the United States and Israel explicitly for their joint military attacks on Iran early on Saturday, Feb. 28. The Council convened an emergency session later the same day, after the US and Israel carried out what UN Secretary-General António Guterres called ... Read more
